data.title: Create Semgrep custom rules for test anti-patterns
data.description:
## Description
Create Semgrep YAML rules targeting test anti-patterns.

### Steps
1. Create plugins/dso/hooks/semgrep-rules/test-anti-patterns.yaml
2. Rules for Python: cat/grep/awk of source files in test assertions, os.path.exists/Path.exists as sole assertion, ast.parse/inspect.getsource in tests
3. Rules for generic (language-agnostic): subprocess.run with cat/grep in tests, file read + string search pattern
4. Each rule has severity=ERROR and high-confidence metadata

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/semgrep-rules/test-anti-patterns.yaml — Create

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Semgrep rules file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/hooks/semgrep-rules/test-anti-patterns.yaml
- [ ] Rules target at least 3 anti-patterns
  Verify: grep -c "id:" plugins/dso/hooks/semgrep-rules/test-anti-patterns.yaml | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
